docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,745.00 FILED BY BENEFICIAL OF CALIFORNIA, INC.DBA BENEFICIAL CREDIT SERVICE . AS TO DEFENDANT KASARDA JOE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KASARDA JOE

NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE TO DEFEND. RETURNED, UNABLE TO FORWARD.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL OF CALIFORNIA, INC.DBA BENEFICIAL CREDIT SERVICE . RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KASARDA JOE $899.58 PRINCIPAL, $55.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $955.37 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO JOE KASARDA RETURNED, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
